signals.title: Trade Desk hiring 12 ML Engineers for “Kokai Decisioning”
signals.summary: Cluster of senior ML roles referencing real-time decisioning, feature stores, and advertiser goal translation—signals continued Kokai investment.
signals.rawExcerpt: Build and productionize models that translate advertiser objectives into bid / budget decisions within the Kokai platform…

signals.title: StackAdapt launches “AdaptAI Creative Studio” beta
signals.summary: Self-serve generative creative with performance prediction for display and CTV—signals a chance for Kargo to productize format-native generation.
signals.rawExcerpt: AdaptAI Creative Studio lets marketers generate, score, and iterate ad variants with predicted attention and CTR…

signals.title: Criteo patent: “Shopper graph linking in-store and open-web events”
signals.summary: IP filing reinforces Criteo’s commerce identity graph; highlights an opportunity for Kargo to bridge retail audiences into high-impact offsite creative.
signals.rawExcerpt: Methods for linking hashed transaction identifiers with anonymized open-web engagement events for bid-time audience resolution…

signals.title: Amazon Ads case study: AMC + streaming TV drives 22% ROAS lift
signals.summary: Published outcome claims strengthen Amazon’s closed-loop narrative; brands may consolidate spend inside AMC-measured environments.
signals.rawExcerpt: Using AMC audiences activated across streaming TV and sponsored display, the brand reported a 22% ROAS lift…

signals.title: Underscore AI raises $28M Series A for agentic bidding
signals.summary: Capital influx into LLM-based bidding agents suggests next-wave optimization stacks may bypass traditional DSP UI workflows.
signals.rawExcerpt: Underscore AI closed a $28M Series A to build autonomous media-buying agents that negotiate goals in natural language…

signals.title: TTD eng blog: “Feature store for real-time creative selection”
signals.summary: Technical post confirms investment in low-latency creative ranking—blurs line between DSP optimization and creative intelligence.
signals.rawExcerpt: We describe a feature store that serves creative embeddings to bid-time models under 8ms p99…

signals.title: IAB AdsCon: StackAdapt talk on “Attention-predicted pacing”
signals.summary: Public roadmap language around attention-based pacing overlaps Kargo’s brand-lift / attention positioning.
signals.rawExcerpt: Session abstract: How predicted attention scores can reallocate daily budgets without sacrificing reach goals…

signals.title: Criteo Q2: Retail Media ARR up 18% YoY
signals.summary: Hard financial evidence of retail media pull; validates adjacent category growth that Kargo should address or partner into.
signals.rawExcerpt: Retail Media net revenue increased 18% year over year, driven by onsite and offsite commerce media…

signals.title: AdCreative.ai posts 40 open roles across EU and US
signals.summary: Aggressive hiring velocity for a generative creative pure-play; indicates product-market fit and GTM scale-up.
signals.rawExcerpt: Open roles: Senior Prompt Engineer, Creative ML, Enterprise AE (NY, London, Berlin)…

signals.title: Walmart Connect + Criteo expand offsite retail media inventory
signals.summary: Partnership deepens offsite commerce media—another pull of brand budgets toward closed retail graphs.
signals.rawExcerpt: Walmart Connect advertisers can activate shopper audiences across Criteo’s offsite network with unified reporting…

signals.title: DV360 “AI Max for Video” rolled to more markets
signals.summary: Google expands automated video optimization; raises the bar for “set goals, get outcomes” buying experiences.
signals.rawExcerpt: AI Max for Video now available in additional markets, using generative assets and automated targeting…

signals.title: Magnite ClearLine adds shoppable CTV templates
signals.summary: Supply-side shoppable CTV formats create an opening for Kargo creative + measurement to plug into premium CTV paths.
signals.rawExcerpt: Publishers using ClearLine can offer interactive shoppable overlays on CTV inventory…
